subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of Bahá, open thy tongue in praise of the Ancient Beauty—may my spirit be a sacrifice for His loved ones—that the souls of the Concourse on High [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه البهاء زبان بثنای جمال قدم روحی لاحبائه الفدا بگشا تا ارواح ملا اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @music and singing, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar
